# Pickup Identification

At Acme Shop, customers must provide valid identification during the pickup of their orders to ensure security and proper identification. Acceptable forms include a government-issued photo ID, such as a driver's license, passport, or state ID card. If someone else is picking up the order, they must be authorized at checkout and present their ID along with a copy of the order confirmation. Orders are ready for pickup within 24 hours, and customers are advised to collect them within seven days of notification without incurring additional fees.

[Source: store_pickup.md#pickup-identification]
